title: Michael Stern
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Michael}}
{{Image|person}}
'''Michael G. Stern''' is an author who wrote many of the [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]] supplements for [[West End Games]]. He is also credited, along with [[Douglas Kaufman]] and [[Greg Gorden]], with developing the official [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] rules that were included in West End Games' ''[[Crisis on Cloud City (adventure book)|Crisis on Cloud City]]'' supplement. Stern is credited as a writer on children's TV shows Imagination Movers, Sofia the First, and Doc McStuffins. He is currently writing and producing Batwheels, a children's show starring Ethan Hawke about Batman, his friends, and their vehicles.

{{Author-stub}}
